x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Full Amount Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The entire transaction amount is reversed.

Comment:
Example:
Transaction: €200
Chargeback amount: €200

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Partial Amount Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Only a portion of the transaction amount is refunded.

Comment:
Example:
Transaction: €150
Disputed portion: €60
Chargeback amount: €60

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Fee-Inclusive Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculation includes administrative or processing fees along with the chargeback amount.

Comment:
Example:
Disputed transaction: €100
Chargeback fee: €20
Total impact: €120

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Currency-Adjusted Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback amount adjusted for currency exchange rates if original transaction and refund are in different currencies.

Comment:
Example:
Transaction: $100
Refund in EUR: €95 based on FX rate

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Net Adjustment Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Final chargeback amount calculated after deducting previous refunds, partial settlements, or adjustments.

Comment:
Example:
Transaction: €200
Prior refund: €50
Final chargeback: €150

x-enumeration-literals.name: Chargeback Interest or Compensation Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Chargeback amount includes interest or compensation due to processing delays or regulatory requirements.

Comment:
Example:
Disputed €100 transaction
Additional €5 interest for delay
Total chargeback: €105
